introSection: Boule et Bill Déboulent was a steel spinning family roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Boule et Bill Déboulent opened in 2019 as the first spinning roller coaster created by Preston & Barbieri.

After experiencing many technical difficulties, the ride was closed during the same season it opened and was replaced the following year by a Preston & Barbieri Junior Ferris Wheel.

To this day, it is the only spinning roller coaster manufactured by Preston & Barbieri.

fullText:
Boule et Bill Déboulent was a steel spinning family roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

Boule et Bill Déboulent opened in 2019 as the first spinning roller coaster created by Preston & Barbieri.

After experiencing many technical difficulties, the ride was closed during the same season it opened and was replaced the following year by a Preston & Barbieri Junior Ferris Wheel.

To this day, it is the only spinning roller coaster manufactured by Preston & Barbieri.



Riders sit facing back-to-back.
